###### LET’S GROW TOGETHER

## Ensuring Growth   for Every Stakeholder.

##### Starting its journey in 1995 as a government contractor of   Pune Municipal Corporation, Nikhil Group today has gained prominence as Pune’s most reputed group for infrastructural and building solutions. With two decades of experience in the Infrastructure Division; Nikhil Group proudly holds in-house Plant and Machinery, Established Management Systems, Qualified Personnel, and Finance to ensure speedy and quality work.

[Read More](https://nikhilgroup.in/about-us/)

SOLUTIONS

#### Nikhil XTRONG Precast

One of the pioneering manufacturers of a wide range of Paver Blocks with a variety of Glossy & Matt Finish Paver Blocks.

![](https://nikhilgroup.in/wp-content/uploads/2023/01/Home-Recovered.jpg)

![](https://nikhilgroup.in/wp-content/uploads/2023/01/clc-blocks.png)

#### Nikhil XTRONG CLC Blocks

We have our own unit of manufacturing for CLC Blocks. Our main objective is to use quality raw materials for our projects and to maintain the speed of work.

![](https://nikhilgroup.in/wp-content/uploads/2023/01/Home-Recovered.jpg)

![](https://nikhilgroup.in/wp-content/uploads/2023/01/crushed-stones.png)

#### Nikhil XTRONG Crushed Stones

As a part of our backward integration policy, we have developed a stream of businesses for supplying & manufacturing crushed stones.

data.summary: Nikhil Group, based in Pune, India, focuses on substantial growth in the infrastructure and building solutions sector since its establishment in 1995. The company emphasizes the growth of all stakeholders, including clients, suppliers, vendors, and employees. Their business verticals include Nikhil Infra, Nikhil Realty, and Nikhil Building Solutions, specializing in government and industrial contracting, residential and commercial development, and precast concrete products. With a commitment to quality, Nikhil Group has a strong portfolio of projects, including roads, hospitals, and smart city initiatives. Their infrastructure and services are geared towards delivering excellence and efficiency in construction.
